// About Me

Turning Search Into Revenue

I'm MD. Mahfuj, a passionate SEO specialist based in Dhaka, Bangladesh. I got into SEO because I was fascinated by one idea: that the right words in the right place can bring thousands of potential customers to a business — for free, every single day.

Since then, I've worked with businesses across multiple markets — from local shops in Bangladesh to e-commerce brands in Europe and the US — helping them grow their organic presence with strategies backed by real data. I use tools like SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Search Console, and Screaming Frog daily to make decisions that actually move the needle.

What sets me apart? I don't just deliver reports — I deliver results you can see in your analytics. I communicate clearly, meet deadlines, and treat every client's business as seriously as my own.

  • Proficient in SEMrush, Ahrefs & Google Search Console
  • Experience with German, US & South Asian markets
  • Commercial keyword research for e-commerce stores
  • Transparent monthly reporting — no vanity metrics

// What I Offer

My SEO Services

End-to-end SEO solutions tailored to grow your business — from technical fixes to local domination.

🔍
On-Page SEO
Optimize every element so Google understands and ranks your content above competitors.
  • Keyword research & strategic mapping
  • Title tags, meta & header optimization
  • Schema markup & structured data
  • Content optimization & internal linking
⚙️
Technical SEO
Fix the invisible issues preventing your site from ranking — no matter how good your content is.
  • Full site audit & crawl analysis
  • Core Web Vitals & page speed fixes
  • Indexation, sitemap & robots.txt
  • Mobile optimization & HTTPS
📍
Local SEO
Dominate Google Maps and local search results — get found by customers in your exact area.
  • Google Business Profile optimization
  • Local citation building & cleanup
  • Review generation strategy
  • Geo-targeted keyword campaigns
🛒
E-commerce SEO
Turn your online store into a traffic and revenue machine with conversion-focused SEO.
  • Product & category page optimization
  • Commercial intent keyword research
  • Faceted navigation & crawl budget
  • Competitor gap analysis

SEMrush Domain Analysis · US Market · AI Search Audit
Full Domain Overview & AI Visibility Analysis
Conducted a comprehensive SEMrush domain overview — analyzing 163K+ organic traffic, 18.6K keywords, authority score 76, and AI search visibility across ChatGPT (1.3K), Google AI Mode (1.9K), and Gemini (895). Used to identify content and backlink gaps for clients competing in the same space.

// Why Work With Me

What Makes Me Different

I treat your business like my own — with transparency, real data, and zero fluff.

📊
Data-First Decisions
Every recommendation is backed by real data from SEMrush, GSC, and keyword research — not guesswork or gut feeling.
🎯
Conversion-Focused SEO
I don't just chase rankings — I optimize for traffic that converts into leads, sales, and actual revenue for your business.
📝
Transparent Reporting
You'll always know what I'm doing and why. Monthly reports with real metrics — no vanity numbers, no confusion.
⚡
Fast Communication
I respond within 24 hours — every time. Professional, clear, and responsive throughout your entire project.
🌍
Multi-Market Experience
Worked on US, European (German market), and South Asian projects — understanding regional SEO nuances that matter.
🔄
Long-Term Mindset
I build SEO systems that compound over time — not quick tricks that vanish with the next Google algorithm update.

// How It Works

My Process

Simple, proven, and fully transparent from day one to delivery.

01
Discovery Call
Understand your business, goals, target market, and current search presence.
02
SEO Audit
Full technical + on-page audit, keyword research, and competitor gap analysis.
03
Strategy
Prioritized roadmap aligned to your KPIs and budget. No unnecessary tasks.
04
Execution
Hands-on implementation with clear documentation and updates at every step.
05
Report & Grow
Monthly data reports, review results, refine strategy, and continue scaling.
